value.body:
## Outcome

Make the desktop app feel complete: polished onboarding, accessible shortcuts, reusable UI components, diagnostics, packaging, release checks, and regression coverage.

## Scope

- Desktop onboarding and settings polish
- Shared `@cycle/ui` productionization
- Keyboard shortcuts and command discoverability
- Packaging, signing, smoke tests, and support diagnostics

## Acceptance criteria

- A new user can install Cycle, add a repository, and understand the app state without developer guidance.
- UI components are reusable and covered through Storybook/tests.
- Builds and releases have repeatable verification.

frontmatter.title: Roadmap: Desktop UX, packaging, and quality
